song.title: Pursue Him
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G B7 Em C Pursue Him and know Him; Be found in Him. . G D G-D Count all things loss for Him. .G B7 Em C Just gain Him, obtain Him; Lay hold of Him . G D G D It’s Christ the central vision.
[C] .G B7 Em C Forgetting the things which are behind, . G D G-D Press on, pursue with this mind. .G B7 Em C By any means each hour now redeem; . G D G (D) Stretch forth lay hold of Him.
[V2] Pursue Him and seize Him, Christ the supreme Just love this precious Person. Forgetting and leaving all other things, Love Him with your whole being.
[V3] Christ now is my center and reality, My life for eternity. All things are just refuse |compared to Him, So love and just gain Him!
